name: Firewall Defenser
name_jp: ファイアウォール・ディフェンサー
desc: If this card is sent to the GY as material for the Link Summon of a Cyberse monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Firewall" monster from your Deck, except "Firewall Defenser". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Cyberse monsters. If a "Firewall" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Firewall Defenser" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY as material for the Link Summon of a Cyberse monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Firewall" monster from your Deck, except "Firewall Defenser". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Cyberse monsters. If a "Firewall" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Firewall Defenser" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY as material for the Link Summon of a Cyberse monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Firewall" monster from your Deck, except "Firewall Defenser". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Cyberse monsters. If a "Firewall" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Firewall Defenser" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Link Material
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
